site.name: Terrell AC and Heating
site.serviceArea: Serving Anytown, Nearbyville, and surrounding communities

heroAlt.headline: Premium HVAC Care for Your Home

about.intro: Terrell AC and Heating is a locally owned HVAC company delivering honest, reliable heating and cooling services to homeowners and light commercial customers. We focus on transparent pricing, clear communication, and long-lasting repairs.

services.title: AC Repair
services.excerpt: Fast AC repairs to get your home cool again.
services.body: We diagnose and repair all makes and models, prioritize quick fixes to get you comfortable, and provide clear cost estimates before work begins.

services.title: Heating Repair
services.excerpt: Heating specialists to restore warmth quickly.
services.body: From furnaces to heat pumps, we restore reliable heat with same-day service options and thorough safety checks.

services.title: HVAC Installation
services.body: We help you choose the right system for efficiency and comfort, then install with care and leave your home clean.

services.title: Maintenance & Tune-ups
services.excerpt: Keep your system running efficiently year-round.
services.body: Seasonal tune-ups, filter changes, and priority scheduling for members of our maintenance plan.

services.title: Indoor Air Quality
services.excerpt: Improve air quality with clean solutions.
services.body: We install and service air purifiers, humidifiers, and ventilation upgrades to help your family breathe easier.

testimonials.author: Jane D.
testimonials.quote: Quick service and fair price — highly recommend.

testimonials.author: Mark R.
testimonials.quote: Technician was professional and fixed our unit same-day.

testimonials.author: Aisha K.
testimonials.quote: Saved our holiday—came out same-day and fixed our heater.

specials.title: Winter Tune-up Special
specials.description: $79 furnace safety tune-up for new customers.

home.title: Terrell AC and Heating — HVAC Repair & Installation
home.description: Trusted HVAC service for residential and light commercial customers. 24/7 emergency service.

about.title: About Terrell AC and Heating
about.description: Learn about our team, values, and commitment to reliable HVAC service.
